chapters.title: General Instructions
chapters.notes: Covers holding the guitar, pick and wrist action, left hand technique, legato principles, attack and exit, explanation of the string chart, fingerboard chart, and warnings/practice guidance.

chapters.title: With Major Chords
chapters.notes: Harmonized major scale studies in triads (Ex. 1-25), covering six fingering forms, arpeggio picking, sequence forms, modulating forms, and finger-strengthening exercises.

chapters.title: With Minor Chords
chapters.notes: Harmonized minor scale studies in six forms (Ex. 26 onward), including melodic and harmonic minor variants, arpeggio picking applications, and low-register forms.
